problem_statement: You are given a sorted array ГўВҖВҳarrГўВҖВҷ of length ГўВҖВҳnГўВҖВҷ, which contains positive integer positions of ГўВҖВҳnГўВҖВҷ gas stations on the X-axis. You are also given an integer ГўВҖВҳkГўВҖВҷ. You have to place 'k' new gas stations on the X-axis. You can place them anywhere on the non-negative side of the X-axis, even on non-integer positions. Let 'dist' be the maximum value of the distance between adjacent gas stations after adding k new gas stations. Find the minimum value of ГўВҖВҳdistГўВҖВҷ.
